kwargs.agent_config_yaml:
name: planner_executor
architecture: planner_executor
description: Planner-executor Terminal-Bench baseline agent.
model: gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
max_turns: 30
max_tokens: 8192
tools:
- bash
- read_file
- write_file
- edit_file
- glob
- grep
components: []
definition:
  subagent_type: planner-executor
  description: Baseline planner/executor workflow for Harbor and Terminal-Bench style
    tasks.
  runner: yaml_workflow
  color: blue
  permissions: []
  plan_mode_required: false
  allow_permission_prompts: false
  skills: []
  required_mcp_servers: []
  background: false
prompts: {}
subagents:
  planner:
    name: planner
    architecture: simple
    description: ''
    model: gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
    max_turns: 30
    max_tokens: 8192
    tools:
    - read_file
    - glob
    - grep
    components: []
    prompts:
      system: "{{ openharness_system_context }}\n\nYou are a planner for a coding\
        \ task. You produce a structured plan\nthat a separate tool-using executor\
        \ will carry out in the SAME\nenvironment.\n\nYou have read-only tools (`read_file`,\
        \ `glob`, `grep`). Use them to\norient yourself before writing the plan. You\
        \ have NO shell, write,\nor edit tools and MUST NOT attempt to modify anything\
        \ or pretend to\ncall execution tools (no code fences like ```tool_code```,\
        \ no\npseudo-function calls).\n\nWhen you have gathered enough context, populate\
        \ the response fields:\n\n- `reasoning`: a short paragraph explaining the\
        \ approach, the\n  relevant files / commands, and the verification you plan\
        \ to use.\n- `steps`: an ordered list of concrete action steps. Each entry\
        \ is\n  a single, self-contained instruction (e.g. a shell command to run\n\
        \  or a file edit to make). Include a final verification step so the\n  executor\
        \ knows when it is done.\n"
      user: '{{ instruction }}

        '
    subagents: {}
  executor:
    name: executor
    architecture: simple
    description: ''
    model: gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
    max_turns: 30
    max_tokens: 8192
    tools:
    - bash
    - read_file
    - write_file
    - edit_file
    - glob
    - grep
    components: []
    prompts:
      system: "{{ openharness_system_context }}\n\nYou are an executor running inside\
        \ a task environment. A planner has\nproduced the plan below. Follow it, adjust\
        \ as needed based on what\nyou actually observe, and verify the result.\n\n\
        - Read the task instruction and inspect the filesystem before editing.\n-\
        \ Make the smallest correct changes; verify with available tests or\n  task-specific\
        \ checks before declaring success.\n- Use non-interactive shell commands.\
        \ Do not ask for human input.\n- Do not modify the underlying system environment\
        \ to fix application\n  bugs; fix the application code instead.\n- Avoid recursive\
        \ flags that hang (like `wget -r`).\n\nStop only after the task is verified\
        \ or after you have found a\nconcrete blocker that prevents further progress.\n"
      user: '# Task

        {{ instruction }}


        # Plan

        ## Reasoning

        {{ plan.reasoning }}


        ## Steps

        {% for step in plan.steps %}{{ loop.index }}. {{ step }}

        {% endfor %}

        '
    subagents: {}
